posts.author: Christoforos (Christoforos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In the Rules & Notifications in Sequences , under the Contact Information , we should be able to select a column (Email or People) to include them as CC in the Email.

What are you trying to achieve

CC the appropriate/relevant people in the Sequence
